SEARCH
Module com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.user.impl
Package com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.party.impl

Class ViewRiksdagenPartyCoalitionEvolution

java.lang.Object
com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.party.impl.ViewRiksdagenPartyCoalitionEvolution
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.io.Serializable
@Entity public class ViewRiksdagenPartyCoalitionEvolution extends java.lang.Object implements java.io.Serializable
The Class ViewRiksdagenPartyCoalitionEvolution. Database view for tracking coalition alignment and evolution between party pairs across election cycles.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ViewRiksdagenPartyCoalitionEvolution()
    Instantiates a new view riksdagen party coalition evolution.

      bridgeClassification - the new bridge classification
